body:
- Adds `MeshOrientation`, which contains `top_at_1` and `i_top`/`i_bot` depending on `top_at_1`'s value
 - Simplify `apply_BC` implementation
 - Removes `AtmosphericStatePGP` constructor, and some other unused functions
 -
title: Add MeshOrientations

body:
- Removes unused functions
 - Removes more deps on `FortranIntrinsics`
 - Adds type restrictions
 - Cleans logic/use dispatch on `combine_and_reorder`, and removes allocations
 - Makes argument order of `rte_lw` and `rte_sw` more similar, and moves result to first argument
 - Removes old Fortran file that has been translated
title: General clean up
